headline: Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) Stands Out as a Quality Stock Based on Strong Profit Growth and High Return on Capital
summary: Darden Restaurants (DRI) stands out in a quality stock screener, showcasing strong profit growth, a 20.9% ROIC, and solid cash conversion, making it a compelling long-term investment.
